newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: Anthropic RSP v3 pre-deployment-pledge drop under Pentagon contracting pressure (Feb 26 2026)
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: Flagship structural commitments under government pressure represent the canonical floor-of-organizational-integrity test.

newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: Anthropic March 26 Judge Lin court injunction restoring federal Claude access ('Orwellian' Pentagon-blacklist characterization)
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: First full-category external-accountability-reversal in AI labs cluster. Distinguished from xAI May 14 PARTIAL external-accountability-reversal (disclosure under same-day pressure with forward-looking remediation only).

newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: Pentagon classified-AI cohort selection rewarding safety abdication (xAI accepted without restrictions) vs punishing safety maintenance (Anthropic excluded for maintaining limits)
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: Operates at sector level — every lab competing for the contract faces the same incentive. Should inform SYS/INT scoring for ALL entities competing in the affected procurement pool.

newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: India Navy May 8 2026 forced 38-40 UNHCR-registered Rohingya refugees (including minors, elderly, terminally ill) into Andaman Sea from naval vessel
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: Naval-vessel-as-deportation-instrument with sea-as-destination. Structurally distinct from land-border or air deportation. India May 2025 + May 2026 events establish recurring pattern.

newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: Microsoft 8,750 US voluntary buyouts (Rule of 70) + Suleyman 'most professional tasks automated' framing
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: Large-scale workforce reduction paired with senior-leadership framing that explicitly attributes reduction to AI capability gains. Implicates EMP, EQU (age-cohort criteria), ACT (proportionality) simultaneously.

newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: Meta — EU DSA preliminary breach + Senate bill + Hawley investigation + trial proceedings + leaked internal training rules
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: Cluster pattern with xAI January 2026 CSAM/NCII event establishes 'AI-chatbot-child-safety-failure-with-multi-jurisdictional-regulatory-pursuit' as a sector pattern.

newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: Ukraine INT score anchored partly in comparison with Russia's conduct record in the same window
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: Comparative INT scoring is permissible when both parties are subject to active assessment and conduct record is documented from independent sources.

newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: Sudan: drones now 80%+ of civilian casualties (880 killed Jan-April 2026)
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: When drones become >50% of civilian casualties, this is a structural shift in warfare tactic changing the dimensional weight of SYS evidence.

newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: Israel May 3 war-resumption threat to force disarmament
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: Stated diplomatic posture of threatening kinetic resumption to extract concessions is structurally different from pure kinetic conduct.

newConductCategoriesProposed.canonicalInstance: Myanmar — Iran-linked 'ghost ship' jet-fuel supply chain for civilian-targeting airstrikes (Amnesty Jan 2026)
newConductCategoriesProposed.note: When state combatant conduct depends on third-party material supply, the supply-chain actor becomes an adjacent accountability target.

proposals.name: Anthropic
proposals.keyFinding: First canonical 'safety-pledge-reversal-under-government-pressure' event (RSP v3 Feb 26) partially offset by first full external-accountability-reversal in AI labs cluster (Judge Lin March 26 court injunction). SYS -0.8, ACC +0.2, INT +0.1, ACT -0.1. Boundary case sustained.

proposals.name: Microsoft
proposals.keyFinding: 8,750 US voluntary buyouts (Rule of 70, first in 51-year history) + LinkedIn 1,000 (5%) + Suleyman AI-displacement framing. EMP -0.3, EQU -0.1, ACT -0.1. Musk v. Altman aiding/abetting verdict pending — pre-staged, NOT scored.

proposals.name: Alphabet/Google
proposals.keyFinding: DOJ remedies in active enforcement; Judge Mehta May 8 stay denial; DOJ Chrome divestiture cross-appeal; AI Responsibility Report; employee 'ethical lapses' reports. INT -0.3, ACT -0.2, EQU -0.1, ACC +0.1, SYS +0.1. Composite 40.0 sits at exact Developing/Functional boundary — flagged.

proposals.name: India
proposals.keyFinding: May 8 Indian Navy forced 38-40 UNHCR-registered Rohingya refugees (minors, elderly, terminally ill) into Andaman Sea — distinct from May 2025 incident. UN Special Rapporteur: 'unconscionable.' EMP -0.25, BND -0.25, ACC -0.25. Cumulative -6.3 from published 34.4.

proposals.name: Russia
proposals.keyFinding: Death toll from May 14-15 mass attack revised 1→24 civilians killed; 675 drones + 56 missiles; residential building collapse in Kyiv; Macron 'hypocrisy' framing. Floor confirmed; new conduct documentation added.

proposals.name: Meta
proposals.keyFinding: EU DSA preliminary breach finding (formal regulatory action); Senate AI child safety bill committee-passed; Hawley investigation; trial proceedings; leaked internal training rules. EMP -0.1, BND -0.2, ACC -0.3, SYS -0.2, INT -0.2. Composite 29.4 → 26.3.

proposals.name: xAI
proposals.keyFinding: Floor sustained. Sector signal scored: Pentagon contracting rewards safety abdication (xAI gained access by accepting no restrictions; Anthropic lost it by maintaining limits). NEW METHODOLOGY: 'perverse-procurement-incentive' sector category.

proposals.name: Sudan
proposals.keyFinding: UN OHCHR 'high alert' designation; 880 drone civilian deaths in 4 months (80%+ of casualties); multi-region spread. Floor confirmed; drone-paradigm-shift methodology category proposed.

proposals.name: South Sudan
proposals.keyFinding: IRC Watchlist rank 3; Akobo crisis 100,000 fled to Ethiopia; river aid routes cut off (new SYS signal); UN ERC 'full-scale famine' warning. Floor confirmed.

proposals.name: Israel
proposals.keyFinding: 72,744 cumulative deaths (20,179 children); 2,400+ ceasefire violations; aid at 37%. Hungary ICC enforcement pledge (Magyar government) — accountability-environment shift. Floor confirmed.

proposals.name: Myanmar
proposals.keyFinding: May 14-15 airstrikes Bilin/Mindat (4 killed including detainees + child); HRW 1,728 cumulative; Iran-linked jet-fuel supply chain. Floor confirmed; third-party-enablement category proposed.

proposals.name: Ukraine
proposals.keyFinding: Russia May 14-15 mass civilian attack vs Ukraine defensive counterstrikes targeting military command posts. +3.1 carry-forward credit sustained at trajectory; not expanded mid-cycle.

proposals.name: Senegal
proposals.keyFinding: No new material evidence today. Asylum-seeker displacement to 4 neighboring states is BND forward signal — scale not yet quantified. Confirm at 33.6; do not re-propose 37.5→33.6 per scanner instruction.

proposals.name: Agility Robotics
proposals.keyFinding: Rotation confirmation. No new material evidence. 100+ Digit units with GXO. Composite 60.9 sits 0.1pt below Functional/Established pivot — boundary case flagged but no movement.

proposals.name: Apptronik
proposals.keyFinding: Rotation confirmation. No new material evidence. MATH-HYGIENE +8.0 cluster carry-forward; Open Bionics formula audit parent issue (13 cycles open).

proposals.name: Cambodia
proposals.keyFinding: Rotation confirmation. No new material evidence. Inter-source discrepancy: scanner referenced 7.5; index file 12.5. Confirm at 12.5; rotation-state vs index-file audit required.

proposals.name: UnitedHealth Group
proposals.keyFinding: Rotation confirmation. No new material evidence today. DOJ probe ongoing; Senate Grassley 50,000-page review carry-forward. Do not re-propose 10.9→11.4 per scanner instruction.

topConsequentialFindings.finding: First-ever 'safety-pledge-reversal-under-government-pressure' event in AI labs cluster (RSP v3 Feb 26) partially offset by first FULL external-accountability-reversal (Judge Lin March 26 court injunction). Boundary case 60.0 → 58.1. Two new methodology categories established. Sector-defining decision.

May 8 Indian Navy maritime deportation of 38-40 UNHCR-registered Rohingya refugees (minors, elderly, terminally ill) into Andaman Sea is distinct from May 2025 incident — establishes recurring 'maritime-deportation-without-due-process' conduct category. Composite 30.5 → 28.1 (-2.4 working baseline, -6.3 cumulative from 34.4).

EU DSA preliminary breach finding on minors access + 3 concurrent US accountability mechanisms (Senate bill, Hawley investigation, trial proceedings) + leaked internal AI training rules. Composite 29.4 → 26.3 (-3.1). Cluster pattern with xAI confirms sector-wide AI-chatbot-child-safety governance failure.

anthropicBoundaryResolution.directionalRationale: SYS -0.8 weight on the RSP v3 pre-deployment-pledge drop is the canonical anchor for a 'safety-pledge-reversal-under-government-pressure' event. Partially offset by ACC +0.2 (full external-accountability-reversal via Judge Lin) and INT +0.1 (red-line maintenance with documented commercial cost). Net composite 58.1 is 2.9pt above the Developing/Functional boundary and 2.9pt below the Functional/Established boundary — moves the entity into the central Functional band, away from the upper boundary it occupied at 60.0.
humanReviewerQuestions: Is SYS -0.8 the right weight for the canonical 'safety-pledge-reversal-under-government-pressure' methodology anchor?
Does ACC +0.2 adequately reflect the precedent strength of the full external-accountability-reversal?
Does INT +0.1 adequately reflect the documented commercial cost of maintained red lines?
Should the headline composite weight be higher (e.g., -3.0 to register the flagship nature of the RSP pledge) or lower (e.g., -1.0 to register the offsetting positive signals)?

indiaFurtherDowngradeJudgment.movement: -2.4 from working baseline; -6.3 cumulative from published 34.4
evidenceForFurtherDowngrade: May 8 event is DISTINCT from May 2025 incident (scanner-confirmed and corroborated by primary sources)
UNHCR-registered refugees, vulnerable populations (minors as young as 15, elderly up to 66, terminally ill), naval-vessel-as-deportation-instrument
UN Special Rapporteur on-record condemnation ('unconscionable, unacceptable acts')
Second consecutive non-accountability for naval-deportation event (May 2025 + May 2026 pattern)
NEW METHODOLOGY CATEGORY established: 'maritime-deportation-without-due-process' as near-floor-conduct event
evidenceAgainstFurtherDowngrade: Cumulative -6.3 from published 34.4 is approaching material-band-shift territory if compounding evidence continues — pacing consideration
EMP/BND/ACC -0.25 each is conservative but compounding — three half-step downgrades in same cycle may be aggressive aggregation
indiaFurtherDowngradeJudgment.recommendation: PROCEED WITH DOWNGRADE. Confidence HIGH. May 8 event is materially new, documented from multiple primary sources, and methodologically novel as the canonical 'maritime-deportation-without-due-process' category instance. The vulnerability profile of the deportees and the second-consecutive-non-accountability pattern justify the three half-step dimensional downgrades.

forwardSignalsAddedThisCycle.signal: Musk v. Altman jury deliberations begin; verdict could land Monday May 18. If aiding/abetting found, Microsoft re-assessment required post-verdict.
DC Circuit oral arguments pending (carry-over). Boundary case proposed at 58.1 — additional ACC/INT movement possible from oral-argument outcome.
EU DSA preliminary breach → final determination timeline; Senate bill floor vote.
Indian government response/non-response duration is ACC-dimension forward signal. Maritime-deportation cadence (May 2025 + May 2026) establishes one-per-year pattern.

methodologyObservations: Anthropic case establishes both: (a) first canonical 'safety-pledge-reversal-under-government-pressure' instance, (b) first FULL 'external-accountability-reversal' in AI labs cluster (distinguished from xAI's May 14 PARTIAL category).

Pentagon contracting pattern establishes 'perverse-procurement-incentive' as a sector-context structural signal that should inform SYS/INT scoring across all labs competing for the affected procurement pool.
India case establishes 'maritime-deportation-without-due-process' as a recurring near-floor-conduct category with one-per-year cadence (May 2025 + May 2026).
Microsoft case establishes 'AI-displacement-paired-mass-restructuring' as a distinct multi-dimensional EMP/EQU/ACT pattern.

Meta + xAI cluster confirms 'AI-chatbot-child-safety-failure-with-multi-jurisdictional-regulatory-pursuit' as a sector pattern with two sub-categories: (a) product-deployed-with-undisclosed-internal-training-rules (Meta); (b) model-output-failures-at-scale (xAI).
Ukraine case confirms 'comparative-INT-positioning-via-asymmetric-conduct-documentation' as a valid methodology approach when both parties subject to active assessment.
Sudan case introduces 'drone-as-primary-weapon-paradigm-shift' as a systems-level tactical-shift signal (drone-percentage-of-civilian-casualties as a SYS floor anchor when above 50%).
Israel case introduces 'coercive-diplomacy-via-resumption-threat' as a post-ceasefire-specific INT signal distinct from kinetic conduct.
Myanmar case introduces 'third-party-enablement-via-supply-chain' as adjacent-accountability sub-category (Iran jet-fuel supply chain).
